title: rubus × praecorruptus
intro: Rubus × praecorruptus is a hybrid plant, resulting from the cross-breeding of Rubus arcticus and Rubus chamaemorus, commonly known as the Arctic raspberry and the bog raspberry. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its leaves and roots, which are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × praecorruptus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a potential remedy for various gastrointestinal issues and infections. Herbal preparations of Rubus × praecorruptus are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal benefits.
